channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ben Harvey discusses Trump's claims of victory over Iran and political acronyms
item.description: In the latest episode of 'Up Late,' Ben Harvey examines Donald Trump's recent statements regarding his self-proclaimed success in the Middle East, particularly in relation to Iran. With Operation Epic...

item.title: KZN opposition calls for suspension of officials over disputed bus contract
item.description: Opposition parties in the KwaZulu-Natal legislature are demanding the immediate suspension of senior transport officials implicated in alleged corruption involving a R6 million-a-month bus contract. M...

item.title: Pakistan's role in mediating US-Iran relations
item.description: The article reportedly discussed Pakistan's involvement in mediating tensions between the United States and Iran. While specific details could not be accessed, it likely highlighted the diplomatic cha...

item.title: Government budget savings claims questioned over reliance on projected reforms
item.description: In the lead-up to the federal budget, the Albanese government has been promoting what it describes as tens of billions of dollars in savings, aiming to strengthen its fiscal credibility. However, the ...

item.title: India and Japan strengthen partnership in quantum science and medical research
item.description: On 6th May 2026, India and Japan have reinforced their collaboration in cutting-edge technologies and health research through a series of high-level agreements signed in New Delhi. Japan’s Minister fo...

item.title: Meralco to pause electricity disconnections for May to July following ERC directive
item.description: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) has issued an order for all distribution utilities, including Meralco, to temporarily halt power disconnections for residential and non-residential consumers who...

item.title: Gas prices rise across Canada with highest costs in major urban regions
item.description: Gasoline prices across Canada increased again on Wednesday, continuing a trend that has been putting pressure on drivers nationwide. The latest hike reflects ongoing volatility in global oil markets, ...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets Hold 8th Overall Pick in 2026 NHL Draft
item.description: Following the NHL draft lottery on Tuesday night, the Winnipeg Jets will enter the 2026 NHL Entry Draft with the eighth overall pick. This is a significant opportunity for the team, as they have not h...

item.title: Severe manpower shortage at new Bengaluru police stations strains officers’ workload
item.description: Four police stations in Bengaluru — Hebbagodi, Madanayakanahalli, Kumbalagodu, and Avalahalli — recently brought under the city police commissionerate are facing serious shortage of staff. Hebbagodi P...

item.title: Tanzania’s Manufacturing Sector Struggles to Access Bank Credit Despite Private Sector Growth
item.description: In Tanzania, the manufacturing sector is facing challenges in accessing bank credit even though overall private sector lending is growing strongly, reaching around Sh46 trillion, about 22 percent of G...

item.title: China commits to supporting peace efforts in Middle East amid Iran-US tensions
item.description: China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi stated that Beijing intends to take a stronger role in ending the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Speaking with Iran’s Abbas Araghchi in Beijing, Wang emphasised ...

item.title: Mary Jane Veloso to testify against alleged illegal recruiter in Mandaluyong court
item.description: Mary Jane Veloso is expected to finally take the witness stand against her alleged illegal recruiter before the Mandaluyong City Regional Trial Court. The case is tied to the long-running human traffi...

item.title: Heard on the Street: Are Memory Chip Makers Overheated After a Run‑Up in Prices and Demand?
item.description: The Wall Street Journal’s ‘Heard on the Street’ column on May 6, 2026, examines whether the recent surge in memory‑chip makers is sustainable, particularly as demand from AI and data centers continues...

item.title: President Marcos Arrives in Cebu to Lead ASEAN Summit 2026 Discussions
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. arrived in Cebu on Wednesday evening to preside over the 48th ASEAN Summit, hosted by the Philippines as the current chair of the regional organization. He la...

item.title: Pakistan to face severe heatwave from May 7 to 11, PMD warns
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a forecast for extreme heat conditions across various parts of Pakistan from May 7 to 11. The southern and central regions, including cities lik...

item.title: Federal infrastructure decisions raise economic concerns
item.description: Most Australians are currently more concerned with rising household expenses and mortgage repayments than with government announcements about large-scale infrastructure projects. The recent federal go...

item.title: Nairobi County sets up new board to regulate liquor licensing and enforce compliance
item.description: Nairobi City County has kicked off the induction of a new Alcoholic Drinks Control and Licensing Board in a bid to streamline the liquor sector and bring back order. The induction is taking place at t...

item.title: Sindh Police Suspends Three Officers Over Alleged Mistreatment of Aurat March Activists Including Sheema Kermani
item.description: In a notable development, the Sindh police have suspended three officials including DSP Nasir Afridi, SHO Hina Mughal, and SHO Nadeem for the alleged mistreatment of Aurat March activists, among them ...

item.title: How to Get Cheap MTN, Airtel, and Glo Data in 2026
item.description: For 2026, Nigerians don dey find better ways to save on mobile data as internet costs don dey high. MTN, Airtel, and Glo get secret USSD codes wey fit give you better deals, known as 'Awoof' bundles. ...

item.title: Fadiel Adams accused of influencing hitman's testimony in Magaqa murder investigation
